definitions: A male given name of Arabic origin, meaning 'the mighty' or 'the powerful'.

Kareem Abdul-Jabbar (born Ferdinand Lewis Alcindor Jr.), an American former professional basketball player who played 20 seasons in the National Basketball Association (NBA) for the Milwaukee Bucks and the Los Angeles Lakers.
examples: Jabbar was known for his towering height.
The family name Jabbar is common in the region.
